projects.title: Feedback and Billing System
projects.description: Comprehensive snack shop billing system with tax calculation, star ratings, and file storage
projects.longDescription: A complete C++ application for snack shop management. Features include automatic bill generation, tax calculation (CGST/SGST), customer feedback with star ratings, and persistent file storage for transaction history. The system maintains inventory, generates daily reports, and provides analytics on popular items.
features: Automatic bill generation with unique IDs
Inventory management with low stock alerts
Daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports
